title: MEDICAL CLINICS - 211info
text: WALLOWA MEMORIAL MEDICAL CLINIC WALLOWA MEDICAL CLINICS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, obstetrics, and general surgery. 701 W Highway 82 Wallowa, OR 97885 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 426-7900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 426-7900 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment or more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts Medicare, OHP, and private insurance. Contact Patient Account Manager for payment arrangements. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Wallowa County Services: General Medical Care Obstetrics/Gynecology If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
